titles.title: Let the weak say I am strong

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let the weak say, "I am strong" Let the poor say, "I am rich" Let the blind say, "I can see" It's what the lord has done in me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Hosanna, hosanna To the lamb that was slain Hosanna, hosanna Jesus died and rose again

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Into the river I will wade And there my sins are washed away From the heavens mercy streams Of the savior's love for me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And I will rise from waters deep Into the saving arms of god And I will sing salvation songs Jesus christ has set me free
